Home / Categories

All categories

Every category we track, with the number of popular SaaS products and their open source alternatives.

📒 Note-taking & Knowledge Base

Tools for personal notes, wikis, and knowledge management — replacing Notion, Evernote, and friends with self-hosted or open source alternatives.

3 SaaS 5 alternatives

💬 Team Communication

Chat, messaging, and voice platforms for teams — open source replacements for Slack, Discord, and WhatsApp.

4 SaaS 5 alternatives

🎥 Video Conferencing

Meetings, webinars, and virtual classrooms — self-hosted alternatives to Zoom, Google Meet and Microsoft Teams.

3 SaaS 2 alternatives

📋 Project Management & Kanban

Task boards, sprints, roadmaps, and issue tracking — open source alternatives to Asana, Jira, Trello, and Monday.

7 SaaS 8 alternatives

☁️ File Storage & Sync

Cloud drive and file synchronization — replace Dropbox, Google Drive, and OneDrive with self-hosted options.

4 SaaS 3 alternatives

📝 Office & Document Editing

Collaborative document, spreadsheet, and presentation editors — open source alternatives to Google Docs and Microsoft 365.

4 SaaS 5 alternatives

🎨 Design & Creative Tools

Graphic design, image editing, and vector tools — open source alternatives to Figma, Canva, Photoshop, and Illustrator.

4 SaaS 5 alternatives

🤖 Automation & Workflows

Connect apps and automate repetitive tasks — self-hosted alternatives to Zapier, IFTTT, and Make.

3 SaaS 3 alternatives

🔒 Password Managers

Secure credential storage — open source alternatives to 1Password and LastPass.

3 SaaS 4 alternatives

📊 Analytics & Product Tracking

Privacy-friendly web and product analytics — open source alternatives to Google Analytics, Mixpanel, and Amplitude.

2 SaaS 3 alternatives

🤝 CRM & Sales

Customer relationship management platforms — open source alternatives to HubSpot and Salesforce.

3 SaaS 3 alternatives

🎯 Helpdesk & Support

Ticketing, live chat, and customer support — open source alternatives to Zendesk and Intercom.

3 SaaS 4 alternatives

📧 Email Marketing & Newsletters

Newsletter and marketing campaign platforms — open source alternatives to Mailchimp and ConvertKit.

2 SaaS 2 alternatives

📋 Forms & Surveys

Build forms, surveys, and questionnaires — open source alternatives to Typeform, Google Forms and SurveyMonkey.

2 SaaS 2 alternatives

📅 Scheduling & Calendars

Meeting and appointment scheduling — open source alternatives to Calendly and Doodle.

1 SaaS 2 alternatives

🎬 Media Streaming

Host and stream your own video, music, and photos — open source alternatives to Netflix, Spotify and Google Photos.

3 SaaS 4 alternatives

✅ Personal Task Management

Individual todo and task apps — open source alternatives to Todoist, Any.do, and TickTick.

1 SaaS 2 alternatives

👨‍💻 Code Hosting & DevOps

Git hosting, CI/CD, and code review — open source alternatives to GitHub and Bitbucket.

1 SaaS 3 alternatives

📈 Monitoring & Observability

Application performance, logs, and uptime — open source alternatives to Datadog and New Relic.

1 SaaS 3 alternatives

🛠️ Internal Tools & Admin Panels

Build internal dashboards and admin UIs — open source alternatives to Retool and Bubble.

2 SaaS 6 alternatives

📏 Online Whiteboards & Diagramming

Virtual whiteboards for workshops, retros, and diagrams — open source alternatives to Miro, Mural and InVision Freehand.

2 SaaS 2 alternatives

📹 Screen Recording & Video Capture

Record screens, make tutorials, and share async videos — open source alternatives to Loom, Camtasia, and Bandicam.

1 SaaS 2 alternatives

✍️ Writing & Grammar Tools

Spell and grammar checkers, prose linters, and style helpers — open source alternatives to Grammarly and Hemingway.

1 SaaS 1 alternatives

📰 RSS Readers & News Aggregators

Follow blogs, news, and podcasts via open standards — self-hosted alternatives to Feedly and Inoreader.

2 SaaS 4 alternatives

📢 Social Media Management

Schedule posts across platforms and track engagement — open source alternatives to Buffer and Hootsuite.

2 SaaS 2 alternatives

🌐 Website Builders & CMS

Build sites without raw code — open source alternatives to Webflow, Wix, and Squarespace.

2 SaaS 5 alternatives

🛒 E-commerce Platforms

Sell online with full ownership of your store — open source alternatives to Shopify and BigCommerce.

1 SaaS 3 alternatives

🚀 App Hosting & PaaS

Deploy apps without managing servers — open source alternatives to Heroku, Vercel, and Netlify.

5 SaaS 3 alternatives

💳 Accounting & Invoicing

Track invoices, expenses, and finances — open source alternatives to QuickBooks, Xero, and FreshBooks.

2 SaaS 3 alternatives

🧠 AI Coding Assistants

Code completion and AI pair programming on your own infra — open source alternatives to GitHub Copilot and Cursor.

1 SaaS 3 alternatives

🔐 Identity & SSO

Single sign-on, OAuth, and identity providers you can self-host — open source alternatives to Okta, Auth0 and Azure AD.

1 SaaS 4 alternatives

🛡 VPN & Private Networks

Encrypted tunnels and mesh VPNs on infrastructure you control — open source alternatives to NordVPN, ExpressVPN, and commercial mesh services.

2 SaaS 2 alternatives

📬 Transactional Email

Send password resets, receipts, and alerts from your own mail infra — open source alternatives to SendGrid, Mailgun, and Postmark.

2 SaaS 2 alternatives

📚 Wikis & Documentation

Team wikis, handbooks, and product docs you own — open source alternatives to Confluence, GitBook and Notion docs.

2 SaaS 5 alternatives

⏱ Time Tracking

Log hours, invoice clients, and monitor billable time — open source alternatives to Toggl, Harvest, and Clockify.

2 SaaS 1 alternatives

🟢 Status Pages & Uptime

Public status pages and uptime monitoring on your own domain — open source alternatives to Statuspage and Better Uptime.

1 SaaS 2 alternatives

📊 Business Intelligence

Dashboards, SQL explorers, and embedded analytics — open source alternatives to Tableau, Power BI and Looker.

2 SaaS 3 alternatives

📨 Newsletters & Paid Publishing

Write, send, and monetize newsletters you own — open source alternatives to Substack, Beehiiv, and Revue.

1 SaaS 1 alternatives
OpenInstead — open source alternatives to the SaaS you already use. Updated May 2026.
Maintained by Alexandru Drăghici in Bucharest, Romania. Reach out: contact@openinstead.dev.
Disclaimer: licensing, features, and pricing change. Verify each tool's current status on its official site before committing.
